Read-only operator chamber · unsigned intents only · no wallet authority
GoalOSSettlement Chamber
AscensionConsoleEvidenceVerification
Operator console · human review boundary

Compose intent. Do not execute.

Generate a structured GoalOS review object for AGIJobManager lifecycle actions. It is deliberately unsigned and inert until an expert separately simulates, reviews, and authorizes it in a live Mainnet environment.

Authority remains NONE_GRANTED. This page has no Ethereum provider calls, no approvals, no chain switching, and no transaction broadcast pathway.
GoalOS intent builderlocal only
Download JSON
Machine-readable preview

Every serious action starts as an inspectable object.

A normal user gets clarity; an expert gets structure; the contract gets no authority from this page.

Generate an unsigned intent to preview the GoalOS object.

Lifecycle governance map

Before execution

Identity check, chain check, token boundary, policy root, risk class, evidence requirement, budget, and rollback expectation.

During expert operation

Simulation, calldata review, allowance discipline, gas review, typed confirmation, wallet prompt review, and receipt inspection.

After settlement

Evidence Docket update, Chronicle entry, evaluator disposition, risk ledger, and claim-boundary preservation.

GoalOS Settlement Chamber · Read-only · Human-gated
